_comment: IGLA RACE formal proofs metadata — trinity-clara/proofs/igla/

theorem_count.note: 47 = 6+5+6+6+13+11 QED-equivalent (Axiom phi_pow_to_lucas counted once). igla_found_criterion: 5 Examples + 6 Theorems all Qed, but welch_ttest_alpha_001_rejects_baseline is an honest placeholder (statement reduces to True until Coq.Interval-backed Student-t bound lands).

admitted_budget.justification: phi_pow_to_lucas requires Coq.Interval for numerical induction over R. Standard practice. Raised from 3 to 4 per general's review.

admitted_lemmas.name: phi_pow_to_lucas
admitted_lemmas.reason: Real induction over phi^(2n): requires interval arithmetic or Coq.Interval. Structurally necessary to anchor PHI:f64 to lucas_even:Z.
admitted_lemmas.close_with: Require Import Coq.Interval.Tactic. Proof. intro n; induction n; [simpl; lra | ...]. Qed.

admitted_lemmas.name: entropy_band_valid
admitted_lemmas.reason: Upper bound requires ln(9)/ln(2) bounds. Closed by: interval. Qed.

admitted_lemmas.name: alpha_phi_numerical
admitted_lemmas.reason: phi^(-3)/2 numerical bound. Closed by: interval. Qed.

qed_placeholders._comment: Theorems with Qed but trivial bodies — honest disclosure per R5. Body must be replaced before status flips to Proven in igla_assertions.json.

lemmas.name: welch_ttest_alpha_001_rejects_baseline
lemmas.reason: Encoding Welch's two-sample one-tailed t-test in Coq requires Coq.Interval for sqrt and Student-t CDF bounds. Slated for the L0 Coq.Interval upgrade lane.
lemmas.runtime_binding: trios:crates/trios-igla-race/src/victory.rs::stat_strength (the runtime guard is the binding contract until the real proof lands; alpha=0.01, mu0=1.55, n_required=3)
lemmas.close_with: Require Import Coq.Interval.Tactic. Replace placeholder with Welch t statistic + CDF bound.

falsification_protocol.description: Each INV file contains either a Lemma *_falsification_is_contradiction or one or more Example refutation_* proving the invariant violation implies False or contradicts victory_acceptable.
falsification_protocol.status: 10/10 present (5 INV files + 5 INV-7 victory-gate refutations)

dual_band_separation.note: Runtime uses certified [phi, phi^2]. Empirical [1.5, 2.8] is the outer safety margin.

compliance.nasa_rule_5: assert >= 2 per pub fn in invariants.rs
